Arab NFTs

Legendary
Supply: 10
Unlocked at $50,000+ contribution
Rare
Supply: 50
Unlocked at $10,000+ contribution
Common
Supply: 500
Unlocked at $1,000+ contribution

Arab NFTs are part of our PepeArab Ecosystem.NFTs can not only be traded, bought and sold but can also be used on our upcoming exchange to get rebates and partake in exclusive contests as well as our NFT-exclusive staking pools.Each NFT will NOT be minted more than the given Supply. If you own an Arab NFT, you get proof of ownership on to your wallet in the form of the ERC721 standard.

Learn more here

Our First-ever meme focused Exchange

PepeArab is set to launch with a new innovation on the Crypto market, making it easy to onboard millions of users into Crypto, specifically the meme market

Instant trade execution
0 gas fees, low transaction fees
Up to 1000x Leverage (on eligible and more liquid trading pairs)
Supporting over 200+ trading pairs (most popular ones)

How to Buy

1. Connect Your Wallet

Connect your MetaMask or other wallet to this website using the widget at the top of the page. From there you can easily buy $PEAB tokens using ETH, BNB, MATIC, USDT, or bank card.

2. Fund Your Purchase

Ensure you have either ETH, BNB, MATIC, or USDT in your wallet to swap for $PEAB. Deposit crypto into your wallet if you don't. Alternatively, use the Card option.

3. Swap Tokens For $PEAB

Go to the buy widget and select the amount of tokens you wish to swap for $PEAB. Authorize the transactions in your wallet and make you leave enough ETH, BNB, or MATIC for gas fees

4. Stake $PEAB Earn $PEAB

Once you've bought $PEAB  tokens, you can immediately put them to work. Click on 'Staking' in the menu and stake your tokens early to take advantage of the extremely high APY!

Road
map

Step 1

  • Nest Security Audit: Crypto Security companies will first make sure that PepeArab is fully audited and operational as described
  • Presale Takeoff: PepeArab will spread across all Social channels as we launch the Presale, during this step we will onboard big marketing campaigns and grow our community
  • Influencer onboarding: Influencers will be onboarded to promote PepeArab and contests/giveaways will be hosted to keep the community engaged and onboard them on to PepeArab

Step 2

  • Social media contests: We plan on reaching millions of people around the globe hosting viral contests with influencers on platforms such as TikTok, Instagram and more.

Step 3

  • Token Listing: The long wait is over - $PEAB will be listed on global exchange platforms along with big trading competitions to ensure the best possible launch
  • Accessibility and visibility: We will make it as easy as possible to get $PEAB tokens by listing on exchanges with different trading pairs such as USDT, BTC, ETH etc.
  • PepeArab Exchange Launch: In this step the PepeArab exchange is launched along with partnerships with other similar projects in order to accelerate the initial trading volume and expand

nomics

FAQ

What is PEPEARAB?
PEPEARAB is a memecoin and a Crypto movement primarily for entertainment purposes
How does PEPEARAB staking work?
During the presale, you can stake your $PEAB tokens to start earning rewards straight away! Once the presale ends and claim goes live, you’ll be able to claim your rewards immediately and withdraw your tokens 7 days after claim goes live. You can also extend your lock period to earn a multiplier on your rewards, therefore extending the date when you can withdraw your tokens
When can I claim my $PEAB?
You will be able to claim your tokens as soon as the presale has concluded
How do I contact the team?
You can contact the team by joining the telegram group and getting in touch with a member of staff or by simply emailing contact@pepearab.com
